title: The rituals of the n-th survivor
excerpt: I needed to sever the **n-th remaining element** from a growing host - repeatedly, in order, without dragging the tail along on every cut. `splice` reads like the obvious rite on paper. At scale it be

title: The curse of Linear-Cursor MCP connection
excerpt: I needed Linear in Cursor on Linux. The OAuth flow almost works, which is worse than it cleanly failing.

title: The curse of Playwright CLI and Chromium on Arch
excerpt: I needed `playwright-cli` for agent browser automation on CachyOS. It failed immediately, not because Chromium was missing. It was looking in the _wrong place_...
